    <item>
        <guid>nba530250</guid>
        <title>LeBron James: Leads Los Angeles to win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lebron-james-2344</link>
        <description>James finished with 28 points (10-25 FG, 2-5 3Pt, 6-8 FT), seven rebounds and eight assists across 37 minutes in Friday's 98-78 win over the Rockets in Game 6 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 01 May 2026 9:33:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530249</guid>
        <title>Alperen Sengun: Double-doubles in Game 6 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/alperen-sengun-5404</link>
        <description>Sengun supplied 17 points (5-12 FG, 7-10 FT), 11 rebounds, two blocks and one assist across 38 minutes in Friday's 98-78 loss to the Lakers in Game 6 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 01 May 2026 9:26:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530246</guid>
        <title>RJ Barrett: Seals win in dramatic fashion</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/rj-barrett-4767</link>
        <description>Barrett produced 24 points (8-21 FG, 4-12 3Pt, 4-5 FT), nine rebounds, three assists and one steal over 43 minutes during Friday's 112-110 overtime victory over the Cavaliers in Game 6 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 01 May 2026 9:03:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530244</guid>
        <title>James Harden: Flirts with triple-double in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/james-harden-3018</link>
        <description>Harden ended with 16 points (5-14 FG, 1-4 3Pt, 5-5 FT), nine rebounds, nine assists, one block and two steals across 44 minutes during Friday's 112-110 overtime loss to the Raptors in Game 6 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 01 May 2026 8:57:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530237</guid>
        <title>Scottie Barnes: Stellar showing in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/scottie-barnes-5390</link>
        <description>Barnes finished with 25 points (11-21 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 3-4 FT), seven rebounds, 14 assists, three steals and three blocks across 48 minutes in Friday's 112-110 win over Cleveland in Game 6 of the first round of the Eastern Conference playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Fri, 01 May 2026 7:54:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
  </channel>
